extraction.one_line_summary: O'CONNOR Ben attacked solo on the final climb at 17km to go, winning by 5:07 on mountaintop finish at Tignes in brutal cold/rain conditions.
tactical_patterns: Israel startup nation controlled pace from km 0 to fragment field before first climb for WOODS points, unusual positioning.
Deceuninck left two domestiques with CAVENDISH when dropped, prioritizing sprinter survival over GC support in mountains.
QUINTANA Nairo specifically targeted polka dot points over stage win, AG2R controlling tempo for jersey classification strategy.
O'CONNOR attacked break at 17km remaining, gap to chasers exploding 5:07 due to extreme weather degrading pursuit.

rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: won by over 5 minutes after solo move from breakaway on final climb, massive gain suggests GC teams miscalculated threat
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: made time cut under 2 minutes with team support despite brutal conditions, Deceuninck committed resources to keep him in race
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: took polka dot jersey prioritizing KOM points over stage, excels at high altitude and targeting Wednesday's Montfaucon points
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: neutral: Israel supported from km 0 for KOM points but QUINTANA outperformed, formidable threat but currently second in classification
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: second in white jersey at 5:32 behind POGAČAR, now top Jumbo-Visma GC rider after unspecified team losses
